items.title: Travelers stranded as cyberattack disrupts major European airports | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A cyberattack on a provider of check-in and boarding systems has disrupted operations at several major European airports including London's Heathrow, causing flight delays and cancellations.

items.content:

items.title: Europe cyberattack, Estonia, H-1B visas and Trump-Xi
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
<article>A cyberattack on a provider of check-in and boarding systems has disrupted operations at several major European airports. Estonia reports an unprecedented airspace violation by Russian jets in the latest test for NATO. The Trump administration says it'll ask companies to pay $100,000 per year for H-1B worker visas. The U.S. and China make progress on a TikTok deal. Plus, what to expect from a packed weekend in sports – including the World Athletics Championships.



Listen to On Assignment here (https://www.reuters.com/podcasts/europes-migration-crisis-decade-later-2025-09-20/) .



Read today's recommended read here (https://www.reuters.com/investigations/syria-risks-rupturing-armed-camps-face-off-across-euphrates-2025-09-19/) .

items.title: US government shutdown looms as Senate rejects stopgap funding bill | REUTERS
items.author: Reuters
items.content:
